Escape Room (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $57,000,756Details
International Box Office $98,614,971
Worldwide Box Office $155,615,727
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,238,148
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,571,159
Total $2,809,307
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Six strangers find themselves in circumstances beyond their control and must use their wits to find the clues or die.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,238,172 (32.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$9,000,000 (worldwide box office is 17.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,717 opening theaters/2,717 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $97,067,120

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 4th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: January 2nd, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)

January 3rd, 2019 (Wide) (Curacao)

MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror/perilous action, violence, some suggestive material and language.

Running Time: 109 minutes
Franchise: Escape Room
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble

Languages: English
